positive: A stylized minimalist illustration of a smiling mountain landscape with abstract wildlife elements. The composition features bold, sweeping lines and clean silhouettes of pine trees and various mountain peaks, arranged in a striking layered pattern. Color palette is limited to deep teal, dusty coral, sage green, and off-white, giving it a cohesive, retro-modern, 'desert doodle' aesthetic. The main subject is a majestic, geometric mountain range at sunrise, viewed through a stylized archway. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. Strong contrast and crisp edges are essential. Vector art style, flat design, high resolution, suitable for screen printing.
